token.name: Myth #1 — The Soft Pull
token.description: The first video in the Ruby Wisdom series. A 26-second correction of the most common credit myth in America. Checking your own credit does NOT hurt your score — it's a soft pull, invisible to lenders.

unlockableContent:
**Full script + printable one-page handout**

Download: https://royalruby.io/unlock/01

Notes for sharing: Feel free to repost the video with attribution to Royal Ruby + @drherman_marigny.
